chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-588 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.3601/2023 22-08-2023 Mr. Muhammad Ali Ansari, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General a/w Ghulam Muhammad Memon, Ali Gohar Soomro and Javed Laghari / contemnors No.2 to 4.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No case for indulgence is made out as on 13.12.2022 this petition was disposed of on the statement made by the petitioner being satisfied over supply of water. Today Irrigations officers have filed statement along with personal bond of petitioner dated 15.08.2023 duly thumbed by him, which shows that water was supplied to the lands of petitioner in presence of witnesses. Accordingly, this contempt application is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
